scripts.build: npm run build -w @re-sourcing/contracts && npm run build -w @re-sourcing/db && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @re-sourcing/api" "npm run dev -w @re-sourcing/web"
scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run start -w @re-sourcing/api" "npm run start -w @re-sourcing/web"
scripts.db:migrate: npm run build -w @re-sourcing/db && npm run migrate -w @re-sourcing/db
scripts.verify: npm run build -w @re-sourcing/contracts && npm run build -w @re-sourcing/api
